title: JavaScript Cookies Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of creating, reading, and managing cookies in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for creating a cookie in JavaScript?
options: Both A and C are valid.

questions.question: What is the key difference between a session cookie and a persistent cookie?
options: A session cookie is only sent to the server.
A persistent cookie must be assigned an expiration date or maximum age.
A session cookie is stored in LocalStorage.

questions.question: What does the 'Secure' flag do for a cookie?
options: It only allows the cookie to be sent over HTTPS.
It makes the cookie inaccessible to JavaScript.

questions.question: Which property can you use to read all current cookies for a page?
How can you specify that a cookie should only be used by the domain it was set on?
